title: Copenhagen Matt Black Ceramic Plant Pot Set of 2 - Ceramic Cement Planters for Indoor & Outdoors - Textured Effect - Large & Medium Plant Pots
features: TEXTURED MATT BLACK FINISH – These ceramic planters have a textured effect and are painted in matt black. Perfect for all contemporary and classical settings
FUNCTIONAL – These black plant pots come as a set of two. Use them together as a set or in separate spaces to plant your favourite plants or flower arrangements
PERFECT SIZE – The large plant pot measures 22.5cm in diameter and 17.5cm height. The small hanging plant pot measures 15.5cm in diameter and 12cm height
IDEAL FOR INDOORS OR OUTDOORS – These black planters are durable and can be used outdoors or indoors
STRONG & DURABLE – Made from premium ceramic cement, these plant pots are durable and stylish
